data.text: A SMALL AND FRIGID FELYSIAN WORLD, ORBITING FAR FROM ITS WEAK S03 STAR
BUT OUT HERE AT THE EDGE OF THE GALAXY, FINDING ANY FELYSIAN PLANETS
AT ALL IS RARE. KALENAS IS MOSTLY LAND, WITH MEDIUM-SIZED SEAS. IT HAS
A SURFACE GRAVITY AND PRESSURE OF ABOUT 0.850

327.36:A FOREST GROWN OVER AN ANCIENT CRATER
